RECORD ON APPEAL Court Judgment-Small Claims Appeal
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Set For Trial On Mar-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 003

SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Mar-23-2005 Continued To Mar-23-05 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 206
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES
RODNEY HAGUE--Plaintiff/ Respondent
RANDOLPH RITCHIE--Defendant/Appellant with Witnesses Richard Schumer and Hebert Barasch

The parties were present as indicated above. All parties and witnesses were sworn in.
Oral and documentary evidence was introduced.

Appellant/Respondent offered the following exhibits:-
1. Letter, several pages stapled together.
2. Curtis Hotel floor plan.
3. Copy of 3-day notice.
4. Restraining Order.
5. Petition for employer--5 pages clipped together.

Defendant/Appellant Randolph Ritchie gave oral testimony.
Witness Herbert Barasch was sworn and examined.
Defendant/Appellant offered the following exhibits:-
1. Police report--several pages clipped together.

At the end of the hearing the court took the matter under submission.

Judge Curtis Karnow, Clerk Param Natt, Not reported (D.003)
